data.current_description: Sets the IAM Policy for a resource
data.summary_suggestion: Set IAM policy for a resource
data.description_suggestion: Sets the Identity and Access Management (IAM) policy for a specified resource (namespace, service, or endpoint). Replaces the existing policy with the provided Policy object containing new bindings. Requires the resource name and Policy in the SetIamPolicyRequest. This operation overwrites all existing access controls for the resource. Returns the updated Policy object.

data.current_description: Tests IAM permissions for a resource (namespace, service or service workload only).
data.summary_suggestion: Test IAM permissions on a resource
data.description_suggestion: Tests whether the authenticated caller has specific IAM permissions on a specified resource (namespace, service, or endpoint). Accepts a TestIamPermissionsRequest containing the resource name and a list of permission strings to test. Returns a TestIamPermissionsResponse containing only the permissions that the caller possesses. Use this operation to verify access before attempting privileged operations.
